source_summary: Bangkok hotel demand during April-October 2026 will be supported by major international conferences and exhibitions at key venues (BITEC, QSNCC), along with music concerts and festivals attracting diverse visitor segments.

events.name: Sustainable Energy Technology Asia (SETA) & Solar+Storage Asia (SSA)
events.note: Large-scale energy technology conference attracting international delegates requiring multi-night stays

events.name: Jewellery & Gem ASEAN Bangkok (JGAB) 2026
events.note: Premier international trade platform for jewellery industry with 350+ brands from 15 countries at QSNCC

events.name: Bangkok Concert Calendar 2026 - Multiple K-pop, Rock, Pop Events
events.note: 34+ concerts across multiple venues (Impact Arena, GMM Live House) with international and K-pop tours generating strong visitor demand

events.name: S2O Songkran Festival
events.note: Major music festival during Songkran season attracting both domestic and international visitors
